title: Pualreng Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Pualreng Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Mizoram

overview.short: Pualreng Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in the Kolasib district in the Indian state of Mizoram.
overview.description: Pualreng Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in the Kolasib district in the Indian state of Mizoram. It was notified on 29 July 2004 and it covers approximately 50 km² of tropical evergreen and semi-evergreen forest in the northeastern hill ranges.

topPlaces.name: Zokhawthiang
topPlaces.description: Zokhawthiang is a village in the Darlawn Community Development Block in the Aizawl district, Mizoram, India and the nearest town is Darlawn, located about 32 km (20 mi) away. According to the 2011 Census, Zokhawthiang had a population of 955 people living in 156 households, with a literacy rate of 97.27%.

topPlaces.name: Sunhluchhip
topPlaces.description: Sunhluchhip is a village in the Darlawn Community Development Block in the Aizawl district, Mizoram, India and the nearest town is Darlawn, located about 24 km away. According to the 2011 Census, Sunhluchhip had a population of 568 people living in 101 households, with a literacy rate of 97.82%.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pualreng Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pualreng Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pualreng Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lengpui Airport, Aizawl (40 km) and the nearest railway station is Agartala Railway Station (162 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pualreng Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pualreng Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pualreng Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Pualreng Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pualreng Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Zokhawthiang, Sunhluchhip.
